title: Senior Plant Manager at Procter & Gamble India

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Procter & Gamble India
jsonLd.description:
Procter & Gamble India has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Raipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Procter & Gamble India:
Procter & Gamble India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Procter & Gamble India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
